title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: An educational video demonstrating Infrastructure as Code fundamentals by building a serverless REST API on AWS using the Cloud Development Kit (CDK) with Python. The tutorial contrasts manual AWS console setup with CDK automation for DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway resources.
